title: Ethereum Solidity Security Foundry Skill
author: JSONbored
copyText:
Install:
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/ethereum-solidity-security-foundry.zip -o ethereum-solidity-security-foundry.zip && unzip -o ethereum-solidity-security-foundry.zip -d ./ethereum-solidity-security-foundry

Usage:
Use this skill to design secure Solidity contracts and enforce quality with Foundry test, fuzz, and invariant workflows.

Asset:
# Trigger
"Apply the Ethereum Solidity security Foundry skill to this contract."

# Required output
1) Threat model and asset flow
2) Contract architecture with security controls
3) Test/fuzz/invariant plan
4) Deployment and verification checklist
detailMarkdown:
# Ethereum Solidity Security Foundry Skill

Build and harden Ethereum smart contracts with Foundry, invariant testing, and battle-tested OpenZeppelin security patterns.

## Trust
- Source: source-backed
- Package: maintainer-built/verified package
- Review: unclaimed

## Install
```bash
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/ethereum-solidity-security-foundry.zip -o ethereum-solidity-security-foundry.zip && unzip -o ethereum-solidity-security-foundry.zip -d ./ethereum-solidity-security-foundry
```

## Usage
Use this skill to design secure Solidity contracts and enforce quality with Foundry test, fuzz, and invariant workflows.
seoDescription: Reusable AI skill for secure Ethereum smart contract development using Solidity, Foundry tests, fuzzing, and OpenZeppelin standards.
